subparts.text: Quantitatively differentiate between TCP/IP Protocol Architecture and OSI Model suitable illustrations. Specifically highlight those differences which are pertinent at Transport and Network Layers.
Comprehensively differentiate between Distance Vector Protocol and Link State Protocol which falls under the category of Interior Gateway Routing Protocol. Give suitable illustrations.
Quantitatively differentiate between TCP and UDP in terms of Reliability, Speed, Connection and Error Checking. Also highlight their use-cases respectively.

Categorically explain the significance of multicast channels for Multicast Routing Protocols in networking. Specifically highlight the importance of Internet Group Management Protocol in Multicast Routing Protocol.

Explain the significance of discovering and maintaining information regarding link-layer addresses of the immediate neighbors in routing. Give proper examples illustrations for the above-mentioned fact.
Quantitatively differentiate between OSPF Unicast Routing Protocol and MOSPF Multicast Routing Protocol with suitable illustrations.
